block_01: The popular work messenger app made a strong debut on the NYSE last week. At the end of its first trading day, shares closed at $38.62*, almost 50% higher than expected.
block_02: With a $23 billion valuation, Slack has surprised analysts and appears to be catching the attention of many investors. Will the buzz around Slack last?
block_05: *Past performance is not an indicator of future performance.
block_06: **The exclusive right to the trademark Slack is owned by the company Slack. Using the trademark on this website is not advertising, is not of a commercial nature and is only for informational purposes.
